commands.title: List msDS-KeyCredentialLink (pyWhisker)
commands.description: List the msDS-KeyCredentialLink attribute for a target account from a UNIX-like system using pyWhisker.

commands.title: Add Shadow Credentials (pyWhisker)
commands.description: Create an RSA key pair, generate an X509 certificate, and add it to the msDS-KeyCredentialLink attribute of a target account using pyWhisker.

commands.title: Automated Shadow Credential Attack (Certipy)
commands.description: Use certipy-ad to automatically add shadow credentials and obtain a certificate for authentication.
